title: 自主货运开发商 Einride 通过 SPAC 上市
summary: Stockholm-based Einride operates a fleet of heavy-duty electric trucks servicing Global Fortune 500 companies across the U.S. and Europe. The post Autonomous freight developer Einride goes public via SPAC appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Autonomous freight developer Einride goes public via SPAC）

title: 利用工业机器人实现全球经济现代化是必要的，但并非不可避免
summary: While service robotics adoption grows, industrial automation faces greater demand and bigger obstacles, notes a columnist.
